_note: Registry of data sources. Add an entry here to feed new data into the dashboards. type = manual | csv | api. Set enabled:true to activate. After editing, run: node pipeline/refresh.js  (fetch + merge + build). The three examples below are disabled templates — copy and adapt them.

sources.name: Bengaluru road deaths (Bengaluru Traffic Police, via OpenCity)
sources.note: NEW traffic source. City road-crash deaths 772/921/893 (2022-24); pedestrian deaths -23% in 2024. Live-ready via the OpenCity 'Bengaluru road accidents' dataset / btp.gov.in.

sources.name: Bengaluru congestion economic cost (Karnataka govt / studies)
sources.note: NEW traffic source. Estimated ~Rs 20,000 crore/year lost to congestion (time, fuel, productivity).

sources.name: Bengaluru air quality — PM2.5 (Statista/IQAir, Dec 2024)
sources.note: NEW source wired up as a working proof. Real values retrieved from Statista/IQAir (Dec 2024 monthly PM2.5). For ongoing live updates, enable the OpenAQ api source below.

sources.name: OpenAQ — Bengaluru PM2.5 (live API)
sources.note: Live path for the same metric. Get a free key at openaq.org, verify the response shape, finish the mapping in adapters.js (openaqAir), then set enabled:true.

sources.name: BMTC daily ridership trend (OpenCity/CAG, Deccan Herald)
sources.note: NEW source. Real figures: pre-COVID avg 37.5 lakh/day, COVID trough 14.4, record 45.5 lakh post-Shakti. Live-ready via the OpenCity CKAN API (BMTC performance dataset).
